title: Support exporting packed struct / union (#860)
body:
This PR is to solve [issue 860](https://github.com/verilator/verilator/issues/860).

`bitHelper` is a `memcpy` at bit level. It copies `width` bits from `inLsb` of a input array to `outLsb` of a output array.  `InWordT` and `OutWordT` should be one of `uint8_t`, `uint16_t`, `uint32_t`, `uint64_t`. This helper function may be put into `verilated_funcs.h`. We can't simply replace parameter `InWordT` and `OutWordT` by `uint8_t` for MSB being at low address in big-endian machine.
